title: Battleworn Dummy
description:
As you approach, it begins to rumble and fizzle and lights up brilliantly!

"[jitter]BZZZT![/jitter] TIME TO TRAIN!!! YOU HAVE [blue]3 TURNS[/blue] TO DEFEAT ME!
CHOOSE A SETTING OR FACE [red]LETHAL HUMILIATION[/red].
Here are the options:"

After the terrifying message, the dummy carefully reads out detailed instructions.

What do you choose?

options.title: Setting 1
options.description: Fight a [blue][varies by difficulty][/blue] HP dummy. Procure [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Potion[/gold].

options.title: Setting 2
options.description: Fight a [blue][varies by difficulty][/blue] HP dummy. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random cards.

options.title: Setting 3
options.description: Fight a [blue][varies by difficulty][/blue] HP dummy. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

notes:
This is a [blue]3-turn[/blue] timed combat event. Each setting contains a different dummy variant with corresponding HP values that scale dynamically based on player count and act progression. Defeating the dummy grants a setting-specific reward, while running out of time results in a defeat message with no reward.

[gold]Setting 1[/gold] rewards a random potion drawn from both your character's personal potion pool and the shared potion pool.

[gold]Setting 2[/gold] upgrades up to [blue]2[/blue] random cards from your deck that are upgradable. If fewer than 2 upgradable cards exist, only those available are upgraded.

[gold]Setting 3[/gold] grants a random relic from the relic reward pool.
